display_text: Blades of Attack, Cost: 450: Provides +9 bonus damage. A fundamental component item for building a variety of early game damage items like Phase Boots and Magic Wand. Offers a direct, cost-efficient boost to right-click damage for last hitting and harassment in the laning phase. Stats: Bonus Damage: +9.
